query:
SELECT id, userId, 
  LENGTH(tastytradeRefreshToken) as token_length,
  CASE 
    WHEN tastytradeRefreshToken LIKE 'eyJhbGciOiJFZERTQSIsInR5cCI6InJ0K2p3dCIsImtpZCI6IlRvaGQ5WV85ZXE4TG5LbF9saHgwQ0NtakExakZoOXo1STJPVzFBZG54Z1UiLCJqa3UiOiJodHRwczovL2ludGVyaW9yLWFwaS5hcjIudGFzdHl0cmFkZS5zeXN0ZW1zL29hdXRoL2p3a3MifQ%' 
    THEN 'NEW TOKEN' 
    ELSE 'OLD TOKEN' 
  END as token_status,
  SUBSTR(tastytradeRefreshToken, 1, 100) as token_start
FROM apiCredentials WHERE userId = 1;
